com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.barcodescanner

Interface BarcodeScanner

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface BarcodeScanner
extends Module
    Helper class for hard-scanning decode.

    Below shows how to use this module to perform hard-scanning decoding to decode barcode:

         //1.Get hard scan.
     BarcodeScanner barcodeScanner = (BarcodeScanner)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance()
                              .getModule(ModuleType.BARCODE_SCANNER);
     //2. Set callback to monitor decoding result, which has two selections.
     //2.1:This will return decoding result,which is type of String
     barcodeScanner.setDecodingCallback(new DecodingCallback() {
          @Override
         public void onDecodingCallback(int eventCode, final String result) {
             //Handle the result.
         }
     }
     //2.2:This will return original decoding result,which is type of byte[]
     barcodeScanner.setDecodingCallback(new DecodingByteCallback() {
          @Override
         public void onDecodingByteCallback(int eventCode, byte[] scanResult) {
             //Handle the result.
         }
     }

     //3.Init ScanUtil and parameters for scanning.
     //scanParameters has default value, you can input "null" here.
     barcodeScanner.initScan(new ScanParameters());

     //4.Start Scan
     barcodeScanner.startScan();

     //5.Stop Scan if you need.
     barcodeScanner.stopScan();

     //6.Release Scan. It shall be called at finished the whole scanning procedure at last.
     barcodeScanner.releaseScan();

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void closeLight()
      Closes light.
      void initScan(ScanParameters scanParameters)
      Init ScanUtil and set hard-scanning related parameters.
      void openLight()
      Opens light.
      void releaseScan()
      Release hard scanner when you finished the whole scanning procedure and before you exit the scanning module.
      void set(ScanSettings scanSettings)
      Sets the scan settings of the code config and preview.
      void setDecodingCallback(IDecodingCallback callBack)
      Registers a callback to notify hard-scanning decoding result.
      void startScan()
      Starts to hard-scanning decoding.
      void stopScan()
      Stops hard-scanning decoding if you need.

    • Method Detail

      • setDecodingCallback

        void setDecodingCallback(IDecodingCallback callBack)
                  throws NSDKException
        Registers a callback to notify hard-scanning decoding result.

        This shall be called before starting hard-scanning decode.

        Parameters:
        callBack - [Required] The callback which is invoked after hard scanning decoding finished.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • initScan

        void initScan(ScanParameters scanParameters)
       throws NSDKException
        Init ScanUtil and set hard-scanning related parameters.
        Parameters:
        scanParameters - [Optional] The scanning related parameter which has default value as following:
        • Timeout: Scanning process timeout.Default is ScanParameters.DEFAULT_SCAN_TIME, it can be set to any value ranged from 1000 to 25400 ms.
        • FocusMode: Focus light mode. Default is ScanParameters.FOCUS_READING, it can be also set to ScanParameters.FOCUS_ON or ScanParameters.FOCUS_OFF
        • SoundSwitcher: Whether to open buzzer when recognize the barcode or not. Default is false.
        • ScannerType: The type of scanner. Default is ScannerType.HARDWARE_SCANNER
        • SurfaceView: The surface view set to scanning process, which is available with all kinds of scanner except ScannerType.HARDWARE_SCANNER.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startScan

        void startScan()
        throws NSDKException
        Starts to hard-scanning decoding.

        It can be use repeatedly if you have already init scanner.

        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • stopScan

        void stopScan()
       throws NSDKException
        Stops hard-scanning decoding if you need.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • openLight

        void openLight()
        throws NSDKException
        Opens light.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • closeLight

        void closeLight()
         throws NSDKException
        Closes light.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • set

        void set(ScanSettings scanSettings)
  throws NSDKException
        Sets the scan settings of the code config and preview.
        Parameters:
        scanSettings - [Required] The scan settings of the code config and preview. See ScanSettings.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • releaseScan

        void releaseScan()
          throws NSDKException
        Release hard scanner when you finished the whole scanning procedure and before you exit the scanning module.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
